## Meeting Purpose

[Explore a community strategy partnership with Nisha Parikh.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Partnership Defined:** Nisha will provide fractional community strategy (5–10 hrs/wk @ $1.5k/mo) to guide a new full-time hire, leveraging her experience scaling SDR Defenders from 0 to 8k members and \~$350k revenue in 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [**New Market Opportunity:** Nisha identified a large, untapped market in professional services (law, HVAC), where PE-backed firms need sophisticated marketing but lack internal expertise, creating a direct fit for GrowthX's AI-driven content systems.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [**Dual-Track Engagement:** The partnership includes two paths: community strategy and business development, with Nisha offering GTM planning and direct introductions to her PE and Pavilion networks.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Community Challenge

  - [**Goal:** Build a sustainable community to evangelize AI marketing and retain audience members from workshops (500–1k registrants).](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [**Status:** 70 paying members with ad-hoc programming (monthly workshops).](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [**Problem:** Lacks a defined strategy and dedicated resources, resulting in low engagement and no clear value proposition.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Nisha's Community Building Expertise

  - [**SDR Defenders Case Study:**](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [Grew from 0 to 8,000 members in one year.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [Achieved \~$350k revenue in 6 months on a $2k/mo operational budget.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [Acquired by Pavilion, validating the model.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [**Key Learnings:**](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [**Value Prop:** Virtual working sessions and AMAs on high-churn topics (e.g., SDR management).](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Monetization:** Started with a freemium model, then tested pricing at $50/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### GrowthX's Agency Model

  - [**Core Service:** Owns organic growth for clients via an AI-driven content engine.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [**Process:** Builds AI agent systems and human expert workflows to produce high-volume, high-quality content (e.g., 30 technical articles/week for Webflow).](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [**Client Profile:** B2B SaaS companies with large contracts (\~$200k/yr).](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

### New Market Opportunity: Professional Services

  - [**Insight:** Private equity (PE) is acquiring professional services firms (law, HVAC) whose owners are retiring.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [**Problem:** These firms lack marketing expertise and operational efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Solution:** A back-office firm (Nisha's employer) manages non-legal functions, creating a need for sophisticated marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** GrowthX can target this market with a tailored, lower-cost offering, leveraging Nisha's network and GTM expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nisha:** Deliver a proposal by mid-next week for a fractional community strategy role ($1.5k/mo for 5–10 hrs/wk).](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [**Jason:** Continue the search for a full-time community manager to eventually report to Nisha.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [**Jason:** Discuss the new market opportunity (professional services) with Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/9z_cvwbVcmyWcU_usVXKpL3so2BZaHYq?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
